name: claude-for-financial-services-china
description: Chinese financial data and analysis plugins — A-share market data, comps, DCF, earnings analysis using AkShare open-source dataset. China-market equivalent of the main financial-services repo.

plugins.name: china-finance
plugins.description: A-share market data, financial statements, industry classification, and fund data via AkShare

plugins.name: china-pitch-agent
plugins.description: End-to-end pitch agent for A-share targets — comps, DCF, LBO, football field, and branded deck

plugins.name: china-market-researcher
plugins.description: A-share sector research — industry overview, competitive landscape, peer comps, and ideas shortlist

plugins.name: china-earnings-reviewer
plugins.description: A-share earnings analysis — model update, variance table, and earnings note

plugins.name: china-model-builder
plugins.description: DCF, LBO, 3-statement, and comps models for Chinese equities

plugins.name: investment-banking
plugins.description: China investment banking — CIM, teasers, pitch decks, merger models, deal tracking

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: China private equity — deal sourcing, IC memos, DD checklists, portfolio monitoring

plugins.name: wealth-management
plugins.description: China wealth management — client reviews, financial plans, investment proposals

plugins.name: fund-admin
plugins.description: China fund administration — NAV tie-out, GL recon, accruals, break tracing

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: China operations — KYC document parsing and rules
